name: vibe-clinic-vscode

scripts.publish: echo 'Error: VS Code Marketplace publishing is strictly prohibited.' && exit 1
scripts.vsce:publish: echo 'Error: VS Code Marketplace publishing is strictly prohibited.' && exit 1

description: Self-diagnosis framework for vibe coding projects — Health monitoring, diagnostics dashboard, and error pattern tracking for AI-assisted development

vibeClinic.cliPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to `bin/vibe-clinic.js` of a vibe-clinic checkout. When set, the extension uses this CLI in **any** project (via `--cwd`), so diagnostics work outside the vibe-clinic repo. Leave empty to auto-detect a local CLI. The extension never falls back to `npx`.

commands.title: Vibe Clinic: Open Dashboard for Folder

author: gyeomsVibe <yoongyeomkim0515@gmail.com>
